simple_types.name: DPLLCTRLB0_LTIMESelect
simple_types.code:
type DPLLCTRLB0_LTIMESelect is
   Default,
   Val_800Us,
   Val_900Us,
   Val_1Ms,
   Val_1P1Ms)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: DPLLCTRLB0_REFCLKSelect
simple_types.code:
type DPLLCTRLB0_REFCLKSelect is

   Xosc32,
   Xosc0,
   Xosc1)
  with Size => 3;
